message:
fix: only update lastHealthyTime on initial detection and after reset (gt-ju8wja)

maybeResetBackoff() was updating lastHealthyTime on every healthy call,
preventing the time delta from accumulating past one heartbeat interval.
If heartbeat < HealthyResetInterval, the backoff would never reset.

Move the lastHealthyTime update inside the reset-success block so the
delta correctly measures time since initial healthy detection.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
